docs.title: DocuSketch mobile — help
docs.text: Short, up-to-date how-to guides for the DocuSketch mobile app. Every guide is built from real app screens captured by the automated screenshot pipeline, so what you see here matches the current version of the app.

docs.title: Guides
docs.text:
• Add a timeline — add a follow-up visit to a project and capture its rooms.
  • Request a sketch — order a floor-plan sketch for an uploaded tour.
  • Camera storage full alert — what the "storage is full" warning means and where to free up space.

docs.title: How to Add a Timeline
docs.text:
Find the initial 360° tour (not a timeline) in your project list and tap the 3 dots. Select "Add timeline." Fill out the timeline information and tap "Next":

If you want to view your previous 360° image, tap the 360° image preview for the room. To return, tap the cross icon:

To start capturing a new 360° image for the room, tap "Take new 360° image" and complete the shooting process. Once the 360° image is taken, you will see a green check icon in the upper-left corner of the room preview:

The three dots icon next to the "Take new 360° image" button can be tapped to either open the 360° image or remove it from the timeline:

After you updated all the 360° images you needed to, tap "Done" and return to the project list by tapping the back arrow:

Upload the timeline:

Note

If you try to upload a timeline for the initial 360° tour (parent tour) that hasn't been uploaded yet, a warning message will prompt you to upload the initial 360° tour first.

docs.title: How to Request a Sketch
docs.text: Once you have uploaded your project (opens in new tab), you can now request a sketch.

docs.title: On Mobile App
docs.text:
Go to the project list, tap the 3 dots on the project card and select "Request sketch":

Choose one of the sketch types. You can enable "Overnight delivery" if your contract includes it. Tap "Request":

Note

Sketch pricing (opens in new tab) depends on your subscription and the size of your 360° tour.

You will receive an email confirming your request. Once your sketch is ready, you will receive another email notification.

docs.title: On Web Portal
docs.text:
To request a sketch on the Web Portal (opens in new tab), find the project you need and click "Request sketch":

Select the sketch type you need, then click "Request":

docs.title: Notification Alert that the Camera Storage is Full
docs.text: Eventually, the 360° images stored in your camera will approach the camera's storage capacity. When that occurs, a warning will appear during the shooting process.

docs.title: DocuSketch DS1 Camera
docs.text: Tap on the warning to view the tutorial for managing the available space in your camera's storage:

docs.title: Ricoh Theta
docs.text: Tap on the warning to view the tutorial for managing the available space in your camera's storage:

docs.title: MadVenture/Mi Sphere
docs.text: Tap on the warning to view the tutorial (opens in new tab) for managing the available space in your camera's storage:
